---
title: "base.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\base.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.53
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.54
---

## Intent
The `base.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on BaseWarden, __init__, _load_config, _should_ignore, research_topic, scan, scan_async, propose_evolution. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via BaseWarden, __init__, _load_config, _should_ignore, research_topic, scan, scan_async, propose_evolution. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [abc](file://abc)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [inspect](file://inspect)

### Exports
- `BaseWarden`
- `__init__`
- `_load_config`
- `_should_ignore`
- `research_topic`
- `scan`
- `scan_async`
- `propose_evolution`
